questions.prompt: Does the enterprise enforce session-based access to network devices?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise enforce session-based access to network devices?

questions.prompt: Is session-based access enforced from a centralized authentication system, or is it enforced locally per enforcement point?
questions.intent: Evaluate is session-based access enforced from a centralized authentication system, or is it enforced locally per enforcement point?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise utilize session renewal automation with frequent re-authentication for network access?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise utilize session renewal automation with frequent re-authentication for network access?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise enforce session-based access per application per user?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise enforce session-based access per application per user?
questions.evaluation_focus: Session-based access per application per user

questions.prompt: Is session-based management enforcement provided by a centralized server for all applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate is session-based management enforcement provided by a centralized server for all applications?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise utilize session renewal automation for applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise utilize session renewal automation for applications?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise utilize session renewal automation with frequent re-authentication for applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise utilize session renewal automation with frequent re-authentication for applications?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formally adopt session-based technology like SSO, SSE, or Kerberos?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise formally adopt session-based technology like SSO, SSE, or Kerberos?
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal adoption of SSO, SSE, or Kerberos

questions.prompt: Are SSO technologies implemented enterprise-wide or for specific applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate are SSO technologies implemented enterprise-wide or for specific applications?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise integrate session-based technology with existing identity and enforcement technology?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise integrate session-based technology with existing identity and enforcement technology?
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with identity and enforcement technology
